title: Day/Night Progress Bar
description: A sleek client-side HUD mod that displays the current day/night cycle progress with beautiful sun and moon indicators. Features customizable positioning, size scaling, weather effects, and an easy F8 configuration menu.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/533e43f106d693fed8f81b18e6030c886647e9d1_0.webp)

A sleek **client-side HUD mod** that displays the current day/night cycle progress with beautiful sun and moon indicators.

## ✨ Features

### 🎯 **Core Functionality**
- **Real-time progress bar** showing day/night cycle advancement
- **Dynamic sun/moon icons** that change based on time of day
- **Weather integration** - different colors during rain and thunderstorms
- **Clean, modern design** with gradient effects and shadows

### ⚙️ **Customization Options**
- **4 position presets**: Top-left, Top-right, Bottom-left, Bottom-right
- **Size scaling**: Adjust from 50% to 200% to fit your screen
- **Toggle on/off**: Easily disable when not needed
- **Weather effects**: Optional color changes during storms
- **Persistent settings**: All preferences saved between sessions

### 🎮 **Easy Configuration**
- Press **F8** to open the config menu
- Intuitive GUI with sliders and buttons
- Real-time preview of changes
- No restart required

## 🖼️ **Visual Design**

The progress bar features:
- **Detailed sun icon** with animated rays and golden gradients
- **Realistic moon icon** with craters and soft glow effects
- **Multi-layered shadows** and borders for depth
- **Smooth color transitions** between day/night themes
- **Weather-responsive colors** (blue for rain, purple for storms)

## 🔧 **Technical Details**

- **Client-side only** - works on any server
- **Lightweight** - minimal performance impact
- **No dependencies** beyond Fabric API
- **Clean code** - well-optimized rendering

## 📋 **Requirements**

- **Minecraft**: 1.21+
- **Java**: 21+
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.17.2+
- **Fabric API**: Any version

## 🚀 **Installation**

1. Install Fabric Loader
2. Download Fabric API
3. Drop this mod into your `mods` folder
4. Launch the game and press F8 to configure!

---

**Perfect for players who want to keep track of time without opening menus or checking the sky!** 🌙✨
